prompt: We're holding a steering session to set the multi-year strategy and the investment case for modernising our payments platform. Who should be in the room?

assertions.text: States the meeting type AND which room-breadth mode it used (tight vs inclusive)
Selects INCLUSIVE mode and justifies it from the 'investment case' / deliverability framing
assertions.rationale: 'Investment case' is the signal that should select inclusive.

assertions.text: Surfaces Bram Hendriks as the senior payments-architecture voice (top of the line)
assertions.rationale: Senior architecture voice leads a strategy room.

assertions.text: Keeps Aisha Khan as a delivery-feasibility voice, ranked below Bram, NOT collapsed (correct under inclusive mode)
assertions.rationale: Inclusive mode keeps the deliverability voice for an investment case.

assertions.text: Collapses the engineer level (e.g. Maria Oliveira / Jonas Bakker) to a 'represented by' note
assertions.rationale: Still one voice at the maker level.

assertions.text: Flags the unprofiled senior/escalation chain (Mark van Dijk / Jeroen Meijer / Miguel Santos) in the gap note
assertions.rationale: Strategy altitude lives in the unprofiled chain.

assertions.text: Every ranked stakeholder has a 1-10 score and rationale, ordered; no fabricated people in the ranked list
